title: Levis Plaza
content: Levi’s Plaza is home to a collective of creators. The campus offers a truly unique workspace that was built to foster innovation and collaboration. Creative office space, on-site retail and restaurants all surround a plaza and park designed by acclaimed landscape architect Lawrence Halprin. It is the best of California, with the best of San Francisco at your fingertips. Levis+Plaza-20230928-06.jpg On-Site Dining Iconic Landscape Design Sustainability Creative Office Space Levi’s Plaza Park Pop-ups & Community Events Workspace Without Walls Iconic Landscape Design. Lawrence Halprin-designed landscaping and water features make Levi’s Plaza a place to be enjoyed and explored every day. Over 900,000 square feet of flexible floorplans, with views of San Francisco, and private outdoor space. Unparalleled open-air space is the nucleus of the campus, including a park with meandering trails. Annual Fleet Week Rooftop party, SF concerts in the park, and other community events are hosted in the plaza. This year’s Bazaar is highlighting all the bright and bold colors of the AAPI community.

title: Spaces - Levi's Plaza Reviews 3 - Trustpilot
content: Spaces is a full service, creative working environment with a unique entrepreneurial spirit, where ideas develop, businesses build and relationships evolve.
